element.label: Explanation of Benefit Base Resource for IDR. Ignore in DD Generation
element.definition: ExplanationOfBenefit-Base

element.short: This field represents the last time that an ExplanationOfBenefit was updated.
element.definition: Last Updated Time
A VALUE INDICATING A FINAL ACTION CLAIM.  VALID VALUES:   Y = FINAL ACTION CLAIM, NOT VOIDED.  N = NOT FINAL ACTION CLAIM
A UNIQUE NUMBER ASSIGNED BY THE ENROLLMENT DATA BASE (EDB) TO EACH EDB RECORD TO IDENTIFY A BENEFICIARY.

A CODE IDENTIFYING THE SOURCE AND TYPE OF CLAIM SUBMITTED THROUGH THE MEDICARE OR MEDICAID PROGRAM.  FOR EXAMPLE:  60 = MEDICARE  NATIONAL CLAIMS HISTORY (NCH) INPATIENT CLAIM   8900 = MEDICAID FEE FOR SERVICE DENTAL     REFERENCE TABLE: CLM_TYPE_CD

element.short: The claim unique ID is a unique ID for the claim within the source system.
element.definition: AN INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) ASSIGNED SURROGATE KEY USED TO IDENTIFY A CLAIM.
AN IDENTIFIER ASSIGNED BY THE CLAIM PROCESSOR (I.E., MEDICARE ADMINISTRATIVE CONTRACTOR, PART D PLAN, OR ENCOUNTER DATA PROCESSING CONTRACTOR) TO A CLAIM.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE PORTION APPLIED TOWARD THE COINSURANCE A BENEFICIARY IS RESPONSIBLE FOR.

element.short: This field is the original identification value assigned.
element.definition: A NUMBER IDENTIFYING THE ORIGINAL CLAIM CONTROL NUMBER (CCN) ON AN ADJUSTED CLAIM.
A DATE IDENTIFYING THE FIRST DAY SERVICES ARE PROVIDED TO A BENEFICIARY.
A DATE IDENTIFYING THE LAST DAY SERVICES ARE PROVIDED TO A BENEFICIARY.  NOTE: FOR DRUG CLAIMS, THIS DATE IS WHEN THE PRESCRIPTION WAS FILLED.
A DATE CORRESPONDING TO THE NATIONAL CLAIM HISTORY (NCH) WEEKLY PROCESSING DATE AND USED IN FINAL ACTION PROCESSING TO IDENTIFY A VERSION OF A CLAIM. IT WILL ALWAYS BE A FRIDAY DATE.
A UNIQUE NUMERIC VALUE ASSIGNED BY THE INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) USED TO IDENTIFY THE SPECIFIC SOURCE OF THE DATA WHEN A ROW IS LOADED INTO THE IDR.    REFERENCE TABLE: V2_MDCR_META_DCTNRY_SRC

A NUMBER IDENTIFYING THE NATIONAL PROVIDER IDENTIFIER (NPI) OF THE BILLING PROVIDER ASSOCIATED WITH THE CLAIM, AS SOURCED FROM THE NATIONAL PLAN AND PROVIDER ENUMERATION SYSTEM (NPPES).     NOTE: THIS COLUMN IS POPULATED IF THE BILLING PROVIDER NPI ON THE CLAIM, AS PROVIDED BY THE SOURCE SYSTEM, CAN BE FOUND IN THE INTEGRATED DEPOSIT REPOSITORY (IDR) PROVIDER DATA AS SOURCED FROM NPPES.
A list of procedures performed
A list of diagnoses.
A list of supporting info
A list of line items
The components of an ExplanationOfBenefit that are specific to an institutional claim
The components of an ExplanationOfBenefit that are specific to a professional claim
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE PORTION APPLIED TOWARD THE DEDUCTIBLE A BENEFICIARY IS RESPONSIBLE FOR.
A CODE DEFINING THE TYPE OF CLAIM RECORD BEING PROCESSED.[NCH]

This is one component of the total amount that is payable on PPS claims, and reflects the IME (indirect medical education) payments for operating expenses (such as labor) for the claim.  NOTE: This field is a sum of the CLM_VAL.CLM_VAL_AMT amounts where CLM_VAL_CD is the IME share code.

This is one component of the total amount that is payable on prospective payment system (PPS) claims and reflects the DSH (disproportionate share hospital) payments for operating expenses (such as labor) for the claim. NOTE: This field is a sum of the CLM_VAL.CLM_VAL_AMT amounts where CLM_VAL_CD is the disproportionate share code.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING HOW MUCH WAS PAID ON AN ADJUDICATED CLAIM.

A NUMBER IDENTIFYING THE NATIONAL PROVIDER IDENTIFIER (NPI) OF AN ATTENDING PROVIDER AS SOURCED FROM THE NPI CROSSWALK REFERENCE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE NATIONAL PLAN AND PROVIDER ENUMERATION SYSTEM (NPPES).

A NUMBER IDENTIFYING THE NATIONAL PROVIDER IDENTIFIER (NPI) OF AN OPERATING PROVIDER AS SOURCED FROM THE NPI CROSSWALK REFERENCE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE NATIONAL PLAN AND PROVIDER ENUMERATION SYSTEM (NPPES).

A NUMBER IDENTIFYING THE NATIONAL PROVIDER IDENTIFIER (NPI) OF AN OTHER PROVIDER AS SOURCED FROM THE NPI CROSSWALK REFERENCE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE NATIONAL PLAN AND PROVIDER ENUMERATION SYSTEM (NPPES).

A NUMBER IDENTIFYING THE NATIONAL PROVIDER IDENTIFIER (NPI) OF THE PROVIDER WHO RENDERED THE SERVICE, AS SOURCED FROM THE NATIONAL PLAN AND PROVIDER ENUMERATION SYSTEM (NPPES).    NOTE: THIS COLUMN IS POPULATED FOR CERTAIN TYPES OF CLAIMS WHERE THE SAME RENDERING PROVIDER NPI APPLIES TO ALL LINES OF THE CLAIM, AND IF THE RENDERING PROVIDER NPI ON THE CLAIM, AS PROVIDED BY THE SOURCE SYSTEM, CAN BE FOUND IN THE INTEGRATED DEPOSIT REPOSITORY (IDR) PROVIDER DATA AS SOURCED FROM NPPES.
AN AMOUNT TOTALING THE SUM OF ALL THE LINE ITEM SUBMITTED CHARGES ON A CLAIM.

A NUMBER ASSIGNED TO A BILLING PROVIDER BY THE CENTERS FOR MEDICARE AND MEDICAID SERVICES (CMS) VERIFYING THAT THE PROVIDER IS MEDICARE CERTIFIED AND FOR WHAT TYPES OF SERVICES .    NOTE: THE OSCAR WAS RENAMED TO CMS CERTIFICATION NUMBER (CCN) IN 2007 BY CMS.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE PORTION OF A CHARGE NOT COVERED BY MEDICARE.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE PORTION OF THE BLOOD DEDUCTIBLE A BENEFICIARY IS LIABLE FOR.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE TOTAL PAYMENT MADE TO A PROVIDER/SUPPLIER FOR SERVICES RENDERED ON AN INDIVIDUAL CLAIM.

A NUMBER IDENTIFYING THE NATIONAL PROVIDER IDENTIFIER (NPI) OF A REFERRING PROVIDER AS SOURCED FROM THE NPI CROSSWALK REFERENCE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE NATIONAL PLAN AND PROVIDER ENUMERATION SYSTEM (NPPES).
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE SUM OF ALL THE LINE ITEM ALLOWED CHARGES ON A CLAIM.
AN AMOUNT PAID BY A BENEFICIARY FOR SERVICES RENDERED ON A CLAIM.
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE CLAIM RECORD TYPE BEING PROCESSED. VALID VALUES: W = PART B V = PART A U= BOTH

A FIVE-DIGIT ZIP CODE DEFINED BY THE UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE (USPS) THAT IDENTIFIES A DESTINATION POST OFFICE OR DELIVERY AREA ASSOCIATED WITH A BENEFICIARY, PROVIDER, OR CLAIM ADDRESS.    REFERENCE TABLE: GEO_ZIP5_CD
AN AMOUNT PAID TO A BENEFICIARY FOR A SUBMITTED CLAIM.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE INTEREST PAID TO A BENEFICIARY DUE TO A DELAY IN THE PAYMENT OF A CLAIM.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE PORTION OF COST THAT IS THE RESPONSIBILITY OF A BENEFICIARY FOR PAYMENT.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE TOTAL CHARGE FOR BLOOD USAGE.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE TOTAL NON-COVERED CHARGE FOR BLOOD USAGE.

element.short: Coordination of Benefits Patient Responsibility Amount
element.definition: AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING A BENEFICIARYS PATIENT RESPONSIBILITY ON A COORDINATION OF BENEFITS (COB) CLAIM.

element.short: Other Third Party Payer Paid Amount
element.definition: AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING HOW MUCH WAS PAID BY A THIRD PARTY PAYER.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE INTEREST PAID TO A PROVIDER DUE TO THE LATE PROCESSING OF A CLAIM.

element.short: Provider Obligation To Accept as Full Amount
element.definition: AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING A PROVIDER'S OBLIGATED TO ACCEPT IN FULL (OTAF) FROM MEDICARE AS PAYMENT. A BENEFICIARY CANNOT BE CHARGED FOR ANY AMOUNT EXCEEDING THE OTAF TOTAL.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING HOW MUCH PAYMENT IS STILL OWED TO A PROVIDER MINUS PRIOR PAYMENTS, OFFSETS, OR ADJUSTMENTS ON A CLAIM.
AN AMOUNT IDENTIFYING THE PORTION OF A CHARGE THAT EXCEEDS THE MAXIMUM ALLOWABLE AMOUNT OR A CONTRACTED FEE ARRANGEMENT FOR A SERVICE.
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE TYPE OF FACILITY THAT PROVIDED CARE TO A BENEFICIARY ON AN INSTITUTIONAL CLAIM. IT IS THE FIRST DIGIT OF THE TYPE OF BILL (TOB).    REFERENCE TABLE: CLM_BILL_FAC_TYPE_CD
A CODE CLASSIFYING THE TYPE OF SERVICE PROVIDED TO A BENEFICIARY ON AN INSTITUTIONAL CLAIM. IT IS THE SECOND DIGIT OF THE TYPE OF BILL (TOB).
A CODE INDICATING THE SEQUENCE OF AN INSTITUTIONAL CLAIM IN THE BENEFICIARYS CURRENT EPISODE OF CARE. IT IS THE THIRD DIGIT OF THE TYPE OF BILL (TOB).
Provider List
Meta Source SK
THE CURRENT STATUS INFORMATION FOR THE PENDING AND PAID CLAIMS CURRENTLY IN THE SYSTEM.
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE STATUS OF A CLAIM.    REFERENCE TABLE: CLM_PD_STUS_CD
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE FIRST APPLICABLE ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR (BEI) THAT APPLIED TO THE CLAIM.
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE SECOND APPLICABLE ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR (BEI) THAT APPLIED TO THE CLAIM.
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE THIRD APPLICABLE ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR (BEI) THAT APPLIED TO THE CLAIM.
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE FOURTH APPLICABLE ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR (BEI) THAT APPLIED TO THE CLAIM.
A CODE IDENTIFYING THE FIFTH APPLICABLE ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR (BEI) THAT APPLIED TO THE CLAIM.

AN INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) DERIVED INDICATOR BASED ON THE CLAIM NEXT GENERATION (NG) ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) INDICATOR CODE FROM CWF (COMMON WORKING FILE), WHICH IDENTIFIES THE BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR THAT IDENTIFIES CLAIMS THAT QUALIFY FOR SPECIFIC CLAIM PROCESSING EDITS.  VALID VALUES:  Y = IF ANY OF THE FIVE CLAIM NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ°Ò (POPULATION BASED PAYMENTS (PBP)).  N = IF Ñ¶4Ò OR Ñ¸9Ò IS FOUND IN ANY OF THE CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_1ST_NUM THROUGH CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_5TH_NUM COLUMNS AND NONE OF THE FIVE NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ°Ò®  NULL = DEFAULT

VALID VALUES:  Y = IF ANY OF THE FIVE CLAIM NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ²Ò (POST DISCHARGE HOME VISITS).  N = IF Ñ¶4Ò OR Ñ¸9Ò IS FOUND IN ANY OF THE CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_1ST_NUM THROUGH CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_5TH_NUM COLUMNS AND NONE OF THE FIVE NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ²Ò®  NULL = DEFAULT

AN INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) DERIVED INDICATOR BASED ON THE CLAIM NEXT GENERATION (NG) ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) INDICATOR CODE FROM CWF (COMMON WORKING FILE), WHICH IDENTIFIES THE BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR THAT IDENTIFIES CLAIMS THAT QUALIFY FOR SPECIFIC CLAIM PROCESSING EDITS.  VALID VALUES:  Y = IF ANY OF THE FIVE CLAIM NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ´Ò (3-DAY SNF WAIVER).  N = IF Ñ¶4Ò OR Ñ¸9Ò IS FOUND IN ANY OF THE CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_1ST_NUM THROUGH CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_5TH_NUM COLUMNS AND NONE OF THE FIVE NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ´Ò®  NULL = DEFAULT

AN INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) DERIVED INDICATOR BASED ON THE CLAIM NEXT GENERATION (NG) ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) INDICATOR CODE FROM CWF (COMMON WORKING FILE), WHICH IDENTIFIES THE BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR THAT IDENTIFIES CLAIMS THAT QUALIFY FOR SPECIFIC CLAIM PROCESSING EDITS.  VALID VALUES:  Y = IF ANY OF THE FIVE CLAIM NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ²Ò (TELEHEALTH).  N = IF Ñ¶4Ò OR Ñ¸9Ò IS FOUND IN ANY OF THE CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_1ST_NUM THROUGH CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_5TH_NUM COLUMNS AND NONE OF THE FIVE NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ²Ò®  NULL = DEFAULT

AN INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) DERIVED INDICATOR BASED ON THE CLAIM NEXT GENERATION (NG) ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) INDICATOR CODE FROM CWF (COMMON WORKING FILE), WHICH IDENTIFIES THE BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR THAT IDENTIFIES CLAIMS THAT QUALIFY FOR SPECIFIC CLAIM PROCESSING EDITS. N = IF Ñ¶4Ò OR Ñ¸9Ò IS FOUND IN ANY OF THE CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_1ST_NUM THROUGH CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_5TH_NUM COLUMNS AND NONE OF THE FIVE NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ´Ò®  NULL = DEFAULT

element.short: Claim ACO Care Management HCBS Switch
element.definition: AN INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) DERIVED INDICATOR BASED ON THE CLAIM LINE NEXT GENERATION (NG) ACCOUNTABLE CARE ORGANIZATION (ACO) INDICATOR CODE FROM CWF (COMMON WORKING FILE), WHICH IDENTIFIES THE BENEFIT ENHANCEMENT INDICATOR THAT IDENTIFIES CLAIMS THAT QUALIFY FOR SPECIFIC CLAIM PROCESSING EDITS.    VALID VALUES:    Y = IF ANY OF THE FIVE CLAIM LINE NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ¶Ò (CARE MANAGEMENT HOME VISITS).    N = IF Ñ¶4Ò OR Ñ¸9Ò IS FOUND IN ANY OF THE CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_1ST_NUM THROUGH CLM_DCMTN.CLM_DEMO_5TH_NUM COLUMNS AND NONE OF THE FIVE NG ACO INDICATOR CODES CONTAINS Ñ¶Ò®    NULL = DEFAULT
